name: Emerald Forest Fleece Onesie
description: Slip into this lush forest-green fleece onesie and feel like you're wrapped in a warm hug. Full-length zip-up front, cosy ribbed navy cuffs at wrists and ankles, and a relaxed balloon-fit silhouette that's equal parts playful and incredibly cosy. Perfect for chilly Nairobi evenings or gifting to your favourite person.

name: Fuchsia Glow Belted Bathrobe
description: Turn your bathroom into a five-star spa with this vibrant fuchsia terry-cloth bathrobe. Luxuriously thick fabric, a wraparound belt, two generous front pockets, and eye-catching silver-thread contrast trim on the sleeves — because you deserve to look fabulous even after a shower.

name: Deep Plum Faux-Fur Collar Robe
description: Nothing says luxury like a faux-fur trim. This deep plum midi robe features a sumptuous curly-fur shawl collar and matching fur cuffs against ultra-soft plush fabric — a combination that feels straight out of a high-end hotel suite. Cinch the matching belt and own the room.

name: Pearl Mist Plush Bathrobe
description: Understated, effortlessly elegant, and impossibly soft — this pearl-grey plush robe is the definition of quiet luxury. Floor-length shawl collar, matching woven belt, and a featherweight feel that'll make you wonder why you ever wore anything else at home.

name: Pure Cloud Terry Bathrobe
description: Hotel-grade, cloud-white terry bathrobe that feels like stepping out of the sea and into pure bliss. Classic shawl lapel, double-loop belt, and deep front pockets. Absorbent, quick-dry fabric that keeps you feeling fresh and pampered every single morning.

name: Velvet Merlot Plush Bathrobe
description: Rich, deep burgundy plush robe that exudes warmth and sophistication. The ultra-soft fleece wraps you like a velvet embrace, while the kimono-style shawl collar and cinch-tie belt give it a sleek, polished silhouette. A wonderful gift — or an excellent treat for yourself.

name: Baby Blush Lightweight Robe
description: Delicate, breezy, and oh-so-feminine — this baby-pink lightweight cotton robe is perfect for warm days when you want coverage without the heat. Soft fabric, kimono shawl collar, matching tie belt, and a barely-there feel that makes it a go-to after a bath or shower.

name: Blush Cotton Kimono Robe — Oversized
description: Generous, enveloping, and wonderfully soft — this oversized blush kimono robe wraps you in a cloud of pale pink comfort. The crinkle-cotton fabric drapes beautifully, and the relaxed fit makes it ideal for lazy mornings, spa days, or lounging in effortless style.

name: Lavender Zip-Up Embroidered Housecoat
description: Classic, feminine, and timeless — this lavender zip-up housecoat features a beautiful embroidered panel across the chest and a scalloped neckline trim. Full-length, relaxed fit perfect for everyday homewear. A wardrobe staple for the woman who values comfort with a touch of elegance.

name: White Quilted Robe with Leopard Accents
description: A stunning clash of classic and wild — this white quilted-texture robe pairs clean crisp fabric with a bold leopard-print belt and matching pocket trims, finished with sleek navy piping on the collar and cuffs. Soft, structured, and completely one-of-a-kind. Perfect for the person who refuses to be boring.

name: Sky Blue Smocked Zip-Up Nightgown
description: Flowing, graceful, and incredibly comfortable — this pale sky-blue nightgown features gorgeous smocked diamond embroidery along a deep V-neckline and full-length zip front. The airy cotton fabric and generous cut make it ideal for sleeping or relaxing at home throughout the day.

name: Pastel Floral Cloud Robe
description: Spring in robe form. This lightweight cotton robe is printed all over in a dreamy watercolour floral pattern — soft blues, blush pinks, and aqua-green blooms on a white base with a multicoloured tie belt to match. Light, playful, and impossible not to smile in.

name: Ivory Sand Plush Short Robe
description: Compact, cosy, and classically elegant — this ivory short plush robe hits just above the knee for a flattering silhouette. Thick yet lightweight fleece, a wide shawl collar, and deep front pockets. Pairs beautifully with slippers and a morning cup of chai.

name: Teal Forest Zip-Up Velour Housecoat
description: Bold, striking, and effortlessly practical — this floor-length teal velour housecoat features a zip-up front, collarless V-neckline, and a rich leaf-pattern embossed texture throughout. A vibrant statement piece for everyday homewear that refuses to blend into the background.

name: Steel Blue Plush Belted Robe
description: Calm, clean, and supremely comfortable — this steel-blue plush robe strikes the perfect balance between masculine and relaxed. Generous shawl collar, a matching cinch belt, and two roomy front pockets in an ultra-soft fleece that gets better with every wash.

name: Dusty Rose Faux-Fur Collar Robe
description: Soft, feminine, and unapologetically luxurious — this dusty rose robe features the same crowd-favourite curly faux-fur collar and cuffs in a gorgeous muted blush tone. Mid-length cut, wide belt that ties at the waist, and a fabric so soft it feels like a cloud. A true bestseller.

name: Blush Pink Hooded Plush Robe
description: The ultimate cosy upgrade — this floor-length blush pink robe comes with a generously sized attached hood for those extra chilly mornings. Ultra-soft plush fleece, wraparound belt, and two deep front pockets. Wear it fresh out of the shower or wrapped up on the couch — either way, you're winning.

name: Avocado & Friends Short Robe
description: Absolutely adorable — this cream terry-cloth robe is covered in a fun avocado-and-cheese character print that makes every morning brighter. Kimono V-collar, matching tie belt, and a fun short cut that hits mid-thigh. Perfect for gifting, lounging, or brightening up your daily routine with a little personality.

name: Midnight Navy Piped Kimono Robe
description: Sleek, sophisticated, and subtly luxurious — this deep navy cotton-gauze kimono robe features crisp white piping on the lapels, cuffs, and hem that adds a refined finishing touch. Lightweight and breathable, it's ideal for warmer weather or as a chic layer over nightwear.

name: Royal Purple Short Terry Robe
description: Short, punchy, and full of personality — this royal purple terry-cloth robe hits above the knee for a fun and flattering silhouette. Thick shawl collar, matching belt, and a front patch pocket. A bold colour choice that's always a conversation starter and a great value pick.

name: Royal Amethyst Long Plush Robe
description: Make an entrance even in your own living room. This floor-sweeping amethyst plush robe commands attention with its bold jewel-tone, generous full-length cut, and a belt that cinches beautifully at the waist. The deep pile fabric is outrageously soft — wear it once and you'll never go back.

name: Charcoal Shadow Plush Robe
description: Cool, understated, and effortlessly stylish — this charcoal-grey plush robe is the perfect choice for the minimalist who still demands the best. Deep shawl collar, wide belt tie, and an incredibly soft pile that makes it hard to take off. Looks great on everyone.

name: Snow White Short Plush Robe
description: Crisp, bright, and luxuriously soft — this shorter white plush robe is a spa-day essential. Thick fleece-touch fabric, wide shawl collar, a matching white belt, and front patch pockets. The knee-length cut makes it versatile for both lounging and getting ready.

name: Espresso Brown Satin-Trim Plush Robe
description: Dark, dramatic, and utterly sophisticated — this deep espresso brown plush robe is finished with rich satin trim on the belt and lapels, elevating it firmly into luxury territory. The contrast between the velvety matte fleece and the lustrous satin detail is absolutely stunning. A standout piece for gifting.

name: Violet Luxe Short Plush Robe
description: Vibrant, plush, and just the right length — this violet short robe in premium fleece hits above the knee with a wide shawl collar and a matching tie belt that cinches perfectly at the waist. Feels as luxurious as it looks, and the bold violet colour stays bright and vivid through many washes.

name: Highland Tartan Plush Bathrobe
description: Classic Scottish Highland tartan meets modern plush luxury. Bold red, green, and white plaid print on a thick fleece body, contrasting solid navy shawl collar and cuffs, plus a matching belt and spacious pockets. The perfect conversation-starter robe — cosy, characterful, and completely distinctive.

name: Midnight Navy Fleece Onesie
description: The sleek, sophisticated sibling to our Forest onesie. Deep midnight-navy fleece in a full-body zip-up cut with a plush stand collar and tapered cuffs. Rich, textured crushed-velvet finish gives it a luxurious look — whether you're lounging at home or heading to a pyjama party in style.

name: Safari Wild Huggie Blanket Robe
description: Part robe, part wearable blanket, all personality. This oversized safari-print Huggie wraps you in a bold leopard-spot fleece with a generous cowl neck and long draped panels. Sit on the couch, answer emails, binge your favourite show — all while looking absolutely untamed. Branded Huggie tag included.
